datalikers.description: DataLikers hosted MCP — 50+ Instagram & TikTok data tools: user search by demographics (gender, age, country, city), engagement analytics, posts, comments, hashtags, stories, highlights and trending tracks. Get an API key at https://datalikers.com/tokens (100 free requests on signup, no credit card). Prefer a local server? Run `npx -y datalikers-mcp` with DATALIKERS_API_KEY instead.
